candidates.why: Direct COGS label for 2025 and 2023.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component; overhead selling expense.
Clear SG&A component; administrative overhead.
Personnel overhead bucket and a good SG&A component when more specific SG&A rows are absent for some years.
Very broad overhead bucket, but less preferred than identified components.
Overhead bucket used in some years; broader than components but useful where explicit SG&A rows differ by year.
Dedicated R&D line above operating profit; should also be included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it.
Specific overhead component, but narrower than broader chosen personnel buckets and may be a subcomponent of Other Operating Expenses.
Specific SG&A component, but likely a subcomponent of Other Operating Expenses in those years.
Overhead component, but likely nested under Other Operating Expenses.
Semantically relevant but no useful evidence in preview versus Employee benefits expenses.
R&D-related, but supplemental and below the main statement section; less preferred than the above-EBIT R&D Costs row.
Balance sheet/current liability line, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|double. No single explicit SG&A total was identified. Chose overhead components/buckets that appear to reflect changing presentation across years. Included R&D Costs as required because it is a separate R&D line above operating profit and should be removed via XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD. Avoided balancing lines and excluded D&A/impairment/finance items.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line located above operating profit; preferred choice even though preview values are blank.
R&D-related fallback label with a value in 2024, but supplemental/below the main operating section so lower priority.

variables.notes: Used the above-EBIT dedicated R&D row first, with the supplemental R&D label as fallback for years where the main label may not be populated.
